output.sparql:
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?winner WHERE {
  ?awardInstance wdt:P1343 wd:Q5380426 ; wdt:P1110 wd:Q18401278 ; wdt:P166 ?winner ; wdt:P585 ?year .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?year)
LIMIT 1
